case_title: SCHLEMMINGER PETER VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SF POLICE DEPT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHLEMMINGER PETER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF POLICE DEPT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCHLEMMINGER PETER AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF POLICE DEPT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PLAINTIFF AMENDED AMT OF CLAIM FROM $357.17N TO $5, 000. DECLARATION FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-03-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF POLICE DEPT
